since_last: 32% of 101 AI names green; Powering AI leads +0.56%; AI bubble risk 50 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 32% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.38% · BTC -2.18% · Gold -2.43% · Nasdaq100 -2.06%. 32% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. Powering AI is doing the heavy lifting at +0.56%.

cards.headline: Powering AI leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Powering AI at +0.56%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -3.13%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TSLA is the standout at -14.15%
cards.body: Leaders: GEV +5.00%, HON +4.80%, SKHY +4.79%, AVAV +3.83%, MU +3.46%. Laggards: TSLA -14.15%, CRNC -8.42%, GOOGL -6.53%, SYM -5.18%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.15% at $116.58
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.15% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
